title: Tropical Elegance Latin Night — Salsa & Bachata Lesson + Social
description: Beginner-friendly salsa and bachata lesson (8–10 PM) followed by a full Latin dance social (10 PM–2 AM) at Brimstone in Alpharetta. No experience needed — it's the perfect excuse to learn something new together. Tonight only. Grab a late dinner beforehand and make a whole night of it.
budget: $15 cover per person (includes lesson + social); dinner extra
location: Brimstone Restaurant & Tavern, 10595 Old Alabama Rd Connector, Alpharetta, GA
vibe: Warm, playful, high-energy — for couples who like to move and laugh at themselves

title: The Garden Party ATL — Variety Show at Bambellas Art World
description: A variety show with live music, comedy, and burlesque at Bambellas Art World, a creative studio/gallery space. Doors 7 PM, show 7–11 PM. Hits three shared interests in one night: paintings/art on the walls, live music on stage, and comedy between sets. Intimate, expressive, very Atlanta.
budget: Ticketed at the door (check HappeningNext for current price)
location: BAMBELLAS ART WORLD, Atlanta, GA (details on event page)
vibe: Bohemian, sensual, fun — for couples who want culture, laughs, and a little edge

title: Sunday Jazz Brunch at C. Ellet's + Battery ATL Stroll
description: Sunday jazz brunch at C. Ellet's inside The Battery Atlanta (11 AM–3 PM) — live vocals, walkable post-meal stroll around the Battery, then optional coffee/ice cream. Vegetarian-friendly menu. The Battery feels like a mini-getaway without leaving the city. A relaxed, low-pressure close to the weekend.
location: C. Ellet's at The Battery Atlanta, 847 Battery Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30339
vibe: Easy, romantic, sunlit — for couples who like great music, good food, and a slow Sunday
